calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-18-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-08-0198 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Peterson for and with John Dietzen (Executor).

The Court raised the issue of the Executor making distribution without a court order. Mr. Peterson stated that Mr. Dietzen felt he was entitled to make distribution, that it should be noted that no harm was done, that he did not make distribution to himself and that he has been told not to do that. Mr. Peterson also stated that he filed a declaration on October 19th regarding the original bank statements, and that he has a declaration regarding the incorrect accounting date and the property taxes which he will file today. The First and Final Account and Report of Executor, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-17-2018 Continued To Oct-22-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
